form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (22.95) when seventh over 390m at this track in a T3 Grade 7. Goes very well from the draw boasting four places from seven starts. Has ability and can sneak into the finish.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at Warrnambool over 390m. Last start finished 4th on April 10 over 390m at this track behind Paw Murbella beaten 4 lengths (22.81) in a T3 Grade 7. Leading chance who should prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage seventh last time out over 390m at Ballarat. Tempted to look elsewhere.

form.formComment: Didn't finish two back and couldn't make the frame last time when she finished last over 390m at this track beaten 7 lengths (22.66) behind Capo Dei Capi in a Grade 7 on March 30. Can bounce back. One of the main chances.

form.formComment: Has finished seventh at her last couple of starts, most recently at Geelong over 400m. Happy enough to dismiss in this field.
